That thread is too high for me!\255\001Guess I need more experience.
Chinese: 那個線程對我來說太高了！\255\001我想我需要更多的經驗。

English: Maybe I ought to stand a bit closer.
I suppose I ought to point\255\001at something first.
Chinese: 我想我應該指出\255\001首先在某件事上。

English: Can't spin any drafts in here.\255\001Too much noise!
Chinese: 這裡任何織法都沒用…\255\001實在太吵了！

English: Hmm. I guess that isn't a draft.
I don't think I spun that quite right.
Chinese: 我認為我的說法不太正確。

English: That didn't do anything useful.
Chinese: 那沒有做任何有用的事情。

English: Those threads didn't feel quite right.
Chinese: 這些線索感覺不太對勁。

English: Think I'm on the right track, though.
Chinese: 不過，我認為我走在是喔。道路上。

English: Can't save your game in demo mode. Sorry.
Chinese: 無法在演示模式下儲存遊戲。抱歉

English: The Secret Weave is incorrect.
Entering demonstration mode.
Welcome to the Age of the Great Guilds.
Chinese: 歡迎來到偉大公會時代。

English: leaf
Last leaf of the year.
That draft won't work on a leaf.
Chinese: 這個織法在葉子上不起作用。

English: sky
Dawn.
Seems to have closed itself.
I'd have to open it first.
Got enough light out of it already!
Didn't work. Oh, well.\255\001Dawn's coming anyway.
Chinese: 沒用…嗯…好吧\255\001無論如何，黎明都會到來。

English: That draft won't work on the sky.
Chinese: 這個織法在天空上不起作用。

English: The End
The End

Rise, son of Cygna.
It is the dawn of your\255\001seventeenth year.
Chinese: 你十七歲生日的曙光已經來臨。

English: I am sent by the Elders\255\001to summon you.
The High Council awaits your\255\001presence in the Sanctuary.
Chinese: 長老會正在聖域等候您。

English: A messenger nymph!
Never seen one so bright before.
One of the Elders must've woven it.
Chinese: 它一定是某位長老編織的。

English: Better get down to the village.
Once was plenty for me.
Is it over now?
sky
The view from the cliff is better.
Think I'll have to get closer first.
owl
Sound asleep.
That draft won't work on an owl.
thorns
Ouch!
They're about as open as thorns can get.
Chinese: 這要是叫『敞開』，那荊棘就沒刺了。

English: They're about as closed as thorns can get.
Chinese: 完全封死了，就跟刺藤一樣密不透風。

English: That draft won't work on thorns.
Chinese: 這織法對荊棘不起作用。

English: hole
hole
hole
hole
grave
I can't read this gravestone.
The owl's tail feathers are\255\001blocking my view.
Already done, I guess.
That draft won't work on a grave.
sky
The view from the cliff is better.
Think I'll have to get closer first.
+The day the sky is opened./ Hmm.
There's an owl in there!
This hole has an owl too.
Another owl! The woods must be full of 'em.
Chinese: 又一隻鴞！樹林裡一定到處都是它們。

English: Looks as if all the holes are full now.
Chinese: 現在看起來好像所有的洞都填滿了。

English: This hole is empty.
Still there.
Hasn't left yet.
It's still in there.
Still empty.
Poor little fella.
That draft won't work on the hole.
Chinese: 這織法對這個洞不起作用。

English: The hole's already wide open.
Whatever lives in the hole\255\001might not like that.
Chinese: 洞裡住著的生物可能不會喜歡這樣。

English: Maybe I'd better not try that.
Chinese: 也許…我最好別嘗試這樣做。

English: wool
Grassy green. Hate that color.
Green again. Yuck.
Looks better in white.
wool
Yuck. I hate green.
This wool hasn't been dyed yet.
White again. That's more like it.
heap
Green. My least favorite color.
Chinese: 綠色的…我最不喜歡的顏色。

English: This pile still needs dyeing.
I like it better in white.
cloth rack
Ugly green.
Ugly green again.
White's an improvement.
flask
That draft won't work on a flask.
dye pot
The pot doesn't have a cover.
That draft won't work on a pot.
book
This is the Book of Patterns that\255\001Hetchel lets me read sometimes.
Chinese: 這是赫切爾有時會讓我翻閱的《織圖之書》。

English: Better take it with me.
It's already closed.
I already know what's in it.
Chinese: 我已經知道裡面有什麼了。

English: That draft won't work on a book.
Chinese: 該織法不適用於一本書。

English: I changed the color!
It's bubbling.
It's plenty green enough already.
It already looks about as pale\255\001as it can get.
Chinese: 它看起來已經蒼白到極致了。

English: Oops!
Still dripping. What a mess.
That draft won't work on wool.
tapestry
The threads describe the creation of the world\255\001and the passage of the Two Shadows.
Chinese: 這些線索描述了\255\001世界的創造\255\001以及兩個陰影的出現。

English: This tapestry describes the world's creation\255\001and the passage of the Two Shadows.
Chinese: 這幅掛毯描述了\255\001世界的創造\255\001以及兩個陰影的經過。

English: tapestry
The pattern shows the rise of the Guilds,\255\001and the story of the Weavers' founding.
Chinese: 此圖案顯示了公會的崛起，\255\001以及織者創立的故事。

English: This tapestry shows the rise of the Guilds,\255\001and the story of the Weavers' founding.
Chinese: 這幅掛毯展示了公會的崛起，\255\001以及織者創立的故事。

English: tapestry
This is the last section of\255\001the Long Tapestry.
Chinese: 這是長掛毯的最後一節。

English: It illustrates the decline of the Guilds,\255\001and the gathering of a Third Shadow.
Chinese: 它說明了工會的衰落，\255\001以及第三個陰影的聚集。

English: Odd. The end of this tapestry\255\001is torn completely off.
Chinese: 奇怪的。這幅掛毯的結尾\255\001被完全撕掉了。

English: This is a section of the Long Tapestry.
Here's another section of\255\001the Long Tapestry.
This tapestry's already as colorful\255\001as it can get.
Chinese: 這幅掛毯的色彩已經非常豐富了。

English: I've already spun all the green out.
Chinese: 我已經把所有的綠色都揮霍光了。

English: Doubt if I could spin much color\255\001out of it now.
Chinese: 我現在恐怕很難從中再提出什麼顏色了。

English: That draft won't work on a tapestry.
I changed the color!
Looks as if the Elders are busy.
Hm... Wouldn't want to interrupt ...
You have heard the findings of the\255\001High Council, Dame Hetchel.
Chinese: 海切爾夫人，\255\001妳已知道委員會的調查結果了吧！

English: What have you to say in your defense?
Chinese: 對於這些指控，妳有何話要為自己辯護？

English: I have no defense or excuses,\255\001Elder Atropos.
Chinese: 我沒有任何辯護或藉口，\255\001阿特羅波斯長老。

English: My actions speak for themselves.
No defense? Not the slightest remorse?
Chinese: 沒有藉口？沒有絲毫的悔恨嗎？

English: This reckless defiance is intolerable.
Chinese: 這種魯莽的反抗是無法容忍的。

English: Why do you disobey us, Hetchel?
Chinese: 海切爾，你為何違抗我們的命令？

English: You have always upheld the\255\001Rules of Membership to the letter.
Chinese: 你一直嚴格遵守織者的規則。

English: Tell us what is in your heart.
Chinese: 告訴我們妳內心的想法。

English: The boy must be told\255\001the truth about his\255\001birth, Elder Clothos.
Chinese: 克洛托斯長老，\255\001必須告訴這孩子\255\001關於他身世的真相。

English: His talent awakens!
Soon he will wield\255\001the power of Weaving,\255\001whether we choose\255\001to guide him or not.
Chinese: 不久之後，\255\001無論我們是否選擇引導他，\255\001他都將掌握織網之力。

English: We dare not desert Bobbin now.
Chinese: 我們現在不該放逐波賓。

English: Stubborn old fool!
The secrets you reveal to Cygna's son\255\001may be turned against us.
Chinese: 你向西格娜的兒子透露的秘密\255\001可能會被用來對付我們。

English: That is why his training was\255\001forbidden by this Council!
Chinese: 這就是為什麼公會\255\001會禁止訓練他！

English: Enough, Lachesis.
We need not explain our decisions.
Chinese: 我們無需解釋我們的決定。

English: It grieves me to see\255\001your many years of\255\001faithful service\255\001end in this disgrace.
Chinese: 看到你多年來的忠誠服務\255\001以這種恥辱的方式結束\255\001我感到非常悲痛。

English: But the wisdom of\255\001the Elders may not\255\001be questioned.\255\001\255\001That is the\255\001final Rule of\255\001Membership.
Chinese: 但長老們的智慧不容置疑\255\001這是高於一切的最終規則！

English: Another one of your\255\001students, Lady Cygna,\255\001learned the terrible\255\001price of defiance in\255\001this very chamber\255\001seventeen years ago.\255\001\255\001Better that\255\001you had heeded\255\001that lesson.
Chinese: 妳的另一位學生－西格娜女士\255\001十七年前就在這間房間裡\255\001領悟到了違抗的可怕代價\255\001妳最好能記得那個教訓。

English: My destiny is in your hands, Elders.
Chinese: 我的命運掌握在你們的編織中，長老們。

English: Our hands are empty, Hetchel.
Chinese: 海切爾，我們並沒有掌握什麼。

English: Gaze once more upon the Great Loom\255\001if you would know your destiny.
Chinese: 如果你想知道自己的命運\255\001就再凝視一次那巨大的織機吧

English: For behold! That destiny is upon you.
Chinese: 看哪！讓織機展現你的命運吧！

English: A swan's egg. Curious destiny.
That draft has never failed before.
Chinese: 這個織法過去從未失靈過。

English: Hark!
I heard a cry. Outside!
The Guild is under attack!
Who dares to desecrate the\255\001Loom of the Weavers?
Chinese: 誰竟敢褻瀆\255\001織者的織機？

English: This is the work of the demon boy.
Chinese: 這是那個惡魔之子的傑作。

English: Kill it while you still can, Atropos!
Chinese: 阿特羅波斯，趁現在還來得及，殺了他！

English: Cursed forever be the name of Cygna's son,\255\001the Loom-Child ... Bobbin Threadbare!
Chinese: 西格娜之子的名字\255\001將永生永世遭到詛咒\255\001織機之子……波賓·疏織！

English: Oh, wonderful.
Everyone's flown away!
No explanations. No goodbyes.
Why do they always leave me behind?
Chinese: 為什麼他們總是把我丟下？

English: egg
That draft won't work on an egg.
distaff
Feels heavier than it looks.
loom
That draft won't work on the Loom.
Hetchel
Strange. Her beak is moving, but\255\001she can't make a sound!
Chinese: 奇怪的。她的喙在動\255\001但是她發不出聲音！

English: Poor Hetchel.
That didn't help. She must be under\255\001some kind of magic spell.
Chinese: 那沒有用\255\001她一定是被下了某種魔法咒語

English: feather
Dead One
It's quiet. The echoes in the Loom\255\001have all died away.
Chinese: 很安靜。織機中的迴聲\255\001都已經消失了。

English: Those are the same four threads\255\001the swan spun on the Elders.
Chinese: 「那就是天鵝對長老們施展的同一個四音符織法。」

English: Those are the same four threads\255\001I heard a few moments ago.
Chinese: 那跟我剛才聽到的那四個音符一模一樣。

English: They're still echoing in the Loom!
It's trying to open!
That egg just made a sound.
The egg is opening!
Do not approach too closely, Weaver.
Throw away that stick, young fool.
Your Weaver magic cannot trouble me.
Chinese: 你的編織魔法，對我不管用。

English: Hmm. That didn't do her any good.
Chinese: 唔。這對她沒有任何好處。

English: Thank goodness! I can talk again!
Chinese: 謝天謝地！我又可以說話了！

English: Ducks are meant to be eaten. Not heard.
Chinese: 鴨子是拿來吃的，不是聽的。

English: I believe we were discussing\255\001the secrets of the Loom.
Chinese: 我相信…我們正在討論織機的秘密。

English: Begone from this chamber, Evil One.\255\001The Loom shall never be yours!
Chinese: 離開這個房間，邪惡之人。\255\001織機永遠不會屬於你！

English: This boy holds the power to destroy it!
Chinese: 這個男孩擁有毀滅它的力量！

English: I do?
Ssh! Close your eyes now, little Bobbin.\255\001But keep your ears open!
Chinese: 噓！現在閉上眼睛，小波賓。\255\001但請保持警覺！

English: Here descends the Third Shadow!
So much for distractions.
Chinese: 好吧，分散注意這招沒用。

English: Unmake the Loom, Bobbin! Quickly!
I can't distract this creature\255\001much longer!
Chinese: 我無法再分散這傢伙的注意力了！

English: I need the threads, Mother Hetchel!\255\001Tell me which four to use!
Chinese: 我需要這些音符線，海切爾媽媽！\255\001告訴我要使用哪四個！

English: This bird has annoyed me once too often.
Mother Hetchel! Where are you going?
To follow the swans!
Thank goodness you're still here.
Mother Hetchel? Is that you?
You know perfectly well it's me.\255\001I saw you watching us.
Chinese: 你很清楚是我。\255\001我看到你在看著我們。

English: What's been happening here, Hetchel?\255\001The whole village has flown away!
Chinese: 這裡發生了什麼事，海切爾？\255\001所有人都飛走了！

English: I'd hoped the swan might come\255\001to save you.
But I never expected her to weave\255\001as much mischief as this!
Chinese: 但我萬萬沒想到牠會惹出這麼多麻煩！

English: Save me? From what?
From the Elders.\255\001\255\001They were going to turn\255\001you into a swan, as they\255\001tried to do to me.
Chinese: 長老們原本打算把你變成天鵝\255\001就像他們對我做的那樣。

English: Looks as if a cygnet was\255\001the best they could manage\255\001with these old bones.
Chinese: 但…變出一顆蛋…\255\001已經是那些老骨頭的極限了。

English: Why do the Elders want to get rid of me?\255\001I haven't broken any Rules.
Chinese: 為什麼長老們要除掉我？\255\001我沒有做錯什麼。

English: They fear you, Bobbin.
But why should anyone be afraid of me?
Chinese: 但為什麼有人要害怕我呢？

English: Ever since you came into our world,\255\001the Elders have watched chaos spread\255\001across the Pattern in the Loom.
Chinese: 自從你來到我們的世界\255\001長老們就一直看著混沌\255\001在織機的圖案中蔓延。

English: They believed - hoped - that your birth\255\001was the cause of this chaos, and that\255\001order might return if you were banished.
Chinese: 他們相信…也『期望』…\255\001你的誕生是造成這場混沌的原因\255\001如果你被放逐，秩序可能會恢復。

English: But now the Elders are banished,\255\001and you are still here!\255\001This can mean only one thing.
Chinese: 但現在長老們反而被放逐了\255\001而你還在這裡！\255\001這只能意味著一件事。

English: The Pattern is failing\255\001of its own accord.\255\001\255\001Soon it will come to\255\001an end ... and with it,\255\001all that is hemmed into\255\001its threads.
Chinese: 織圖正在自行瓦解！\255\001\255\001它很快就會終結\255\001隨之終結的\255\001還有所有被它關聯的一切。

English: A third Shadow is nigh!
Is there any way to stop it?
Chinese: 有什麼辦法可以阻止它嗎？

English: Stop chaos? The Elders thought they could.
Chinese: 阻止混沌？長老們認為他們可以。

English: Now they know better. So should you.
Chinese: 他們確實也『知道』了…你也應該如此。

English: If we can't stop the chaos,\255\001what CAN we do?
Chinese: 如果我們不能阻止混沌\255\001我們能做什麼？

English: We can embrace it.\255\001\255\001Or ... escape!

The swan has rescued the\255\001rest of our Guild from the\255\001coming time of darkness.\255\001\255\001The way before us now\255\001is clear.\255\001\255\001We must find out where\255\001our flock has flown, and\255\001join them if we can!
Chinese: 天鵝從即將到來的黑暗時代中\255\001拯救了我們公會的其餘成員。\255\001現在，我們面前的道路已經清晰可見。\255\001\255\001我們必須找到我們的族群飛向何方，\255\001如果可以的話，加入他們吧！

English: You've already found\255\001the Elder's distaff.\255\001Good.\255\001\255\001Never let it out of\255\001your grasp!
Chinese: 很好！你找到了長老的織杖。\255\001永遠不要讓它離開你的手！

English: Pick up the Elder's\255\001distaff lying here.\255\001It is yours now.\255\001\255\001Never let it out of\255\001your grasp!
Chinese: 撿起長老的織杖，它現在屬於你了。\255\001永遠不要讓它離開你的手！

English: You won't be able to\255\001weave very much with it\255\001at first, I expect.\255\001\255\001But as you gain practice,\255\001more and more of its power\255\001will reveal itself to you.
Chinese: 一開始你可能無法用它編織出很多東西，\255\001我想。但隨著你練習的增多，\255\001它會向你展現出越來越多的力量。

English: Plight?
One of our clients placed an order\255\001for ten thousand fattened sheep.
Chinese: 我們的一位客戶下了一萬隻\255\001肥羊的訂單。

English: That's enough to feed an army!

English: But we do not concern ourselves with\255\001how our customers use our products.

English: They probably won't get their sheep anyway.

English: No? Why not?
Our local dragon seems to have acquired\255\001a taste for fresh mutton.
Chinese: 我們這裡的龍似乎開始\255\001迷上了新鮮羊肉。

English: Our sheep are bred for extra whiteness.\255\001It can see them from miles away.

English: Thank you for answering my\255\001summons so quickly.
Chinese: 謝謝你這麼快就回應我的\255\001召喚。

English: shepherds
Never had a chance.
That wouldn't be very respectful.
That draft won't work on the shepherds.
Chinese: 這織法對牧羊人不起作用。

English: Fleece! What happened? We were overrun!
Chinese: 弗莉絲！發生什麼事了？我們被擊潰了！

English: You were saved by the mercy\255\001of yonder boy.

English: His power has grown since last we met.

English: My Songs ... useless.

Chinese: 少數倖存的人也都在受苦。

English: At least we can end their misery.\255\001Extend your powers if you can!
Chinese: 至少我們可以結束他們的痛苦。\255\001如果可以的話，展現你的力量吧！

English: dragon
dragon
dragon
Guess I'll have to wake it first.
dragon
Guess I'll have to wake it first.
gold
gold
gold
straw
straw
straw
My! Aren't we clever today!
Chinese: 天哪！我們今天還真聰明！

English: Just put it back before you leave.
Chinese: 離開前記得把它放回去就好。

English: Thanks, sweetie.
Glad you remembered how to do it.
Chinese: 很高興你還記得怎麼做。

English: Looks a lot more comfortable.
This pile's already spun that way.
Chinese: 這堆已經編織成這樣了。

English: Fast asleep.
It's already wide awake.
It's already sound asleep.
Yawn! That nap made me hungry.
Chinese: 哈欠！剛那一覺讓我肚子餓了。

English: Yawn!
Uh-oh. It's snoring on the straw!

English: Eeeek! Fire!
That draft won't work on the dragon.
Eeeek! Fire!
Put it out! PUT IT OUT!
That was NOT funny, young man.
Chinese: 這一點都不好笑，年輕人。

English: We do NOT approve.
That draft won't work on the gold.
That draft won't work on the straw.
Chinese: 這織法對稻草不起作用。

English: Well, well. Silly me.
This is what I get for being in a hurry.
Chinese: 這就是我太著急的下場。

English: Thought you felt a little scrawny.
Chinese: 我想你覺得自己有點骨瘦如柴吧。

English: Can't keep your eyes off me, eh?
Chinese: 你的視線就是離不開我，對吧？

English: Where'd you get your manners?\255\001Stop staring at me! Really!
Chinese: 你到底懂不懂規矩？\255\001別再盯著我看了！真是的！

English: Was I staring? Sorry.
Aw, forget it. Don't pay any\255\001attention to me.
I get crabby on an empty stomach.
Chinese: 我肚子餓的時候脾氣會很暴躁。

English: Oh.
Are you gonna incinerate me now?
Chinese: 你現在要把我燒成灰嗎？

English: Incinerate you?\255\001My! Aren't you the\255\001foxy one!\255\001\255\001You've come to the\255\001wrong lair if THAT's\255\001what you're after.
Listen, sweetie.\255\001I haven't done\255\001FIRE since my last\255\001mating season.\255\001\255\001And you don't WANT\255\001to know how long\255\001ago THAT was.
Chinese: 聽著，親愛的。\255\001自從我上一次的\255\001交配季節後，我就再也沒\255\001噴過火了。\255\001\255\001而你絕對不會想\255\001知道那已經是\255\001多久以前的事了。

English: Those little tongues\255\001of flame running up\255\001and down my nostrils?\255\001Please!\255\001\255\001Too much heat for\255\001this old reptile.

English: WON'T, honey. Doesn't fit my lifestyle.
Chinese: 是不想，親愛的。這不符合我的生活方式。

English: Just between you and me, the stuff\255\001gives me the willies.
Chinese: 只在你我之間說說，那些東西\255\001讓我覺得渾身發毛。

English: Wow!
Wondering who my decorator is, right?\255\001Well, you're looking at her.
Chinese: 想知道我的裝潢設計師是誰，對吧？\255\001嗯，你現在就看著她呢。

English: This pile is SAD\255\001compared to what I\255\001USED to have lying\255\001around here.\255\001\255\001I picked up a load of\255\001crystal once that was\255\001to DIE for. Honestly!
Chinese: 跟這附近\255\001曾經擺放的東西\255\001比起來，\255\001這堆東西實在太可悲了。\255\001\255\001我以前曾收集過一大堆\255\001簡直美死人的\255\001水晶。說真的！

English: Then wouldn't you know?\255\001\255\001This third-rate wizard\255\001tries to rip apart my\255\001volcano. We're talking\255\001MAJOR earthquake here.\255\001\255\001Ruined ALL my fancy\255\001glassware. I made that\255\001boy very, VERY sorry,\255\001let me tell you.
Chinese: 你猜後來怎麼著？\255\001\255\001那個三流巫師\255\001竟然試圖撕裂我的\255\001火山。我們這裡可是\255\001發生了超級大地震。\255\001\255\001毀了我所有精緻的\255\001玻璃器皿。我讓那個\255\001男孩感到非常、非常後悔，\255\001告訴你吧。

English: Did manage to save one\255\001little knickknack.\255\001\255\001The loveliest glass ball.\255\001It was SO precious.\255\001\255\001So what did I do? Ha!\255\001Lost it in the caves\255\001under the mountain.\255\001Rolled away before I\255\001could grab it.
Chinese: 好不容易才救下一個\255\001小擺飾。\255\001\255\001那是顆最可愛的玻璃球。\255\001它是那麼地珍貴。\255\001\255\001但我又做了什麼？哈！\255\001居然把它掉在山下的\255\001洞穴裡。\255\001還沒等我抓住，\255\001它就滾走了。

English: Never did find that puppy.\255\001C'est la vie.
Chinese: 再也沒找回那個小寶貝。\255\001這就是人生啊。

English: Can't get there from here.
sphere
That draft won't work on the sphere.
Chinese: 這織法對法球不起作用。

English: pool
Plenty full enough already.
That draft won't work on the pool.
dry hole
Dry as a bone.
Already dry as a bone.
That draft won't work on the pool.
Is that MY reflection? Ugh.
Guess I won't be going back that way.
Chinese: 我想我不會再從那裡回去了。

English: cave
steps
This arrangement's a bit more usable.
Chinese: 這種排列方式比較實用。

English: Repair costs must be spiraling.
Chinese: 維修費用肯定要飆升了。

English: They look twisted enough already.
Chinese: 它們看起來已經夠扭曲的了。

English: Doubt if I could untwist them any more.
Chinese: 我懷疑自己是否還能解開它們。

English: That draft won't work on the steps.
Chinese: 這織法對台階不起作用。

English: He's already sound asleep.
That draft won't work on him.
Rusty
Torn to pieces. Ugh.
Ugh. Don't want to look like him now!
Chinese: 啊。現在不想看起來像他！

English: He's not sleeping. He's dead!
He's already sleeping. Permanently.
That draft won't work on him.
grave
These grave markers are made\255\001from blocks of metal.
Chinese: 這些墓碑是用金屬塊做成的。

English: Already done.
That draft won't work on the grave.
Chinese: 這織法在墳墓上不起作用。

English: Rusty
boy@@
Hey! You look just like me.
Chinese: 嘿！你看起來就像我一樣。

English: And you look like me.
Cute trick, Weaver.
Just don't forget to switch us back\255\001when you're done fooling around.
Chinese: 只是別忘了在玩夠之後\255\001把我們換回來。

English: Yawn! These robes sure are soft.
Chinese: 哈欠！這些長袍確實很柔軟。

English: Why'd you wake me up again?
Let me sleep, will you?
Would you PLEASE let me get some sleep?
Pest.
Better not wander too far.
You're NOT leaving. I mean it!
Chinese: 你休想離開。我是認真的！

English: Oh, no you don't!
You and your stick got me into this mess.
Chinese: 你和你的棍子讓我陷入了困境。

English: You're not going anywhere until\255\001you help me out!
Chinese: 除非你幫我解決這個麻煩，\255\001否則你哪也別想去！

English: You did it.

You can bring people back?
From the DEAD?
You were hurt. I healed you.\255\001That's all.

English: I guess I ought to ... thank you.
Don't. It's all my fault anyway.
Can you come with me, Bobbin?
Chinese: 波賓，你能跟我一起去嗎？

English: I've gotta find out what happened\255\001to the rest of my Guild.
Chinese: 我得弄清楚我的公會其他成員\255\001\255\001到底發生了什麼事。

English: Zzzzzz ...

Chinese: 我不確定我該不該嘗試那個。

English: Yawn! Caught me napping.

Chinese: 以前從沒見過像你這樣打扮的人。

Chinese: 我的本名是威爾羅特，但大家都叫我\255\001羅斯。\255\001\255\001羅斯·奈爾本德。

English: I'm supposed to be\255\001gathering firewood.\255\001\255\001But this plateau's\255\001been picked clean.
Chinese: 我本來該去收集木柴的。\255\001\255\001但這片高地的木柴，早就被撿得一乾二淨了。

English: What's your Guild, Rusty?

Chinese: 我們的城市早在「陰影」出現之前就存在了。

English: Yawn! All this talk makes me sleepy.

English: Wake me if you find your swans.\255\001Never seen one before.
Chinese: 如果你找到你的天鵝叫醒我。\255\001以前從未見過。

English: Rusty
That Weaver kid did this to me!
Chinese: 那個織者小子竟然這樣搞我！

English: Now I have to wait Outside.
Chinese: 現在我必須在外面等待。

English: If I ever get my hands on him ...
Chinese: 如果我能把手伸到他身上...

English: Back to the Pattern! That was easy.
Chinese: 回到織圖裡！這還挺簡單的。

English: Pity that someone has to die\255\001for me to return.

English: Dragon. Sigh. Poor child.
Now where can Bobbin have gone?

Chinese: 那些鐵匠生性多疑。\255\001他們絕不會讓織者進去的。

English: Uh oh.
Uh oh.
Perhaps I ought to look into this.
Well, well. Look who's here.
Chinese: 哎呀，哎呀。看看是誰來了。

English: Rusty?
My old pal. Bobbin Threadbare.
Rusty, this is awful!
How did it happen?

Well, Bobbin, old buddy,\255\001I think it went something\255\001like this.\255\001\255\001I'm lying here, minding\255\001my own business, when this\255\001strange new kid shows up\255\001and decides he wants to\255\001switch clothes with me.
Chinese: 是這樣，波賓，老兄，\255\001事情的經過大概是這樣的。\255\001\255\001我正躺在這裡，這時有個奇怪的新小子出現了，\255\001還決定他想要跟我互換衣服。

English: I figure, +Hey! So what?\255\001Have a little fun, right?\255\001We can always switch back\255\001again later./\255\001\255\001So this kid walks away\255\001looking just like me.\255\001\255\001Fine. Only one problem.
Chinese: 我想，『嘿！那又怎樣？\255\001找點樂子嘛，對吧？\255\001我們隨時都可以再換回來。』\255\001\255\001於是這小子就走掉了，\255\001看起來變得跟我一模一樣。\255\001\255\001很好。只有一個問題。

English: The kid forgets to\255\001mention that he has a\255\001FORTY-FOOT DRAGON out\255\001to get him.\255\001\255\001And what happens when\255\001that very same dragon\255\001sees me lying here?\255\001\255\001Looking JUST LIKE YOU?
Chinese: 這小子忘了提他惹上了一條四十呎長的龍，\255\001正到處在找他。\255\001\255\001而當那條龍看到我躺在這裡，\255\001長得就跟你一樣時，\255\001會發生什麼事呢？

English: I don't know what to say.
Anyway, I end up like this. Dead.
Chinese: 總而言之，我落得這步田地。死了。

English: Gulp.
Some idiot rips the universe apart\255\001and hauls us all back Inside!
Chinese: 某個白痴撕裂了宇宙，\255\001把我們全都『拉回來』了！

English: A lot of Dead Ones are really upset.
Chinese: 很多死者為此感到非常火大。

English: That's understandable.
In fact, some of them have decided\255\001to take over the world.
Chinese: 事實上，他們中有些人已經決定\255\001要接管這個世界。

English: Starting with my hometown.
Still napping.
Strange place to take a nap.
Chinese: 這午睡的地點還真奇怪。

English: gate
Wide open.
That draft won't work on the gate.
Chinese: 這織法對大門不起作用。

English: gate
Shut tight.
It's already shut tight.
That draft won't work on the gate.
Chinese: 這織法對大門不起作用。

English: Hail, young Nailbender!
Hail!
Stoke is looking for you.\255\001He sure looks mad!
Chinese: 史托克正在找你。\255\001他看起來氣炸了！

English: You'd better get in there quickly!
Let me open the gate for you.
Still out here, Nailbender?
Chinese: 還在外面晃啊，奈爾本德？

English: Stoke's looking for you in there.
I'll open up for you again.
Stoke's getting REAL mad, Nailbender!
Chinese: 史托克真的非常生氣了，奈爾本德！

English: I'd get in there NOW if I were you.
Chinese: 如果我是你，我現在就會馬上進去。

English: Who keeps closing this thing?
Chinese: 到底是誰一直把門關上？

English: Sigh.

Chinese: 這是你自找的，奈爾本德。

English: Halt! Who goes there?
Just me. A friendly stranger.
Chinese: 是我啦。一位友善的陌生人。

English: +A friendly stranger./ Haw!
This is a private Guild, my\255\001strange young friend.
Chinese: 這是一個私人公會，\255\001這位奇怪的年輕朋友。

English: The gate opens for members only.
Chinese: 大門只對工會會員開放。

English: Now go away and play somewhere else.
Chinese: 現在快走開，去別的地方玩。

English: Well, well.
If it isn't the Friendly Stranger. Haw!
Chinese: 這不是那位友善的陌生人嗎。哈！

English: Thought I told you to go play\255\001somewhere else.
Chinese: 我以為我叫你去別的地方玩了。

English: This gate is CLOSED to strangers.\255\001Get the idea?
Chinese: 這扇門謝絕陌生人進入。\255\001懂了嗎？

English: Still around, eh?
You may be friendly, kid, but you're\255\001not too bright.
Chinese: 孩子，你也許很友善，\255\001但你腦筋似乎不太靈光。

English: You are NOT going past this gate.\255\001Understand?
Chinese: 你休想通過這扇門。懂嗎？

English: Members! Only!
Sigh.
I get all the kooks on my shift.
Chinese: 我當班時總會遇到一堆怪咖。

English: Out.
I said OUT.
O - U - T.
Are you deaf? OUT!
Persistent, aren't you?
I'd better not go back there dressed like this.
Chinese: 我最好別穿成這樣回去。

English: woodbin
It's empty.
Full as it can get.
It's already as full as it can get.
Chinese: 它已經滿到不能再滿了。

English: It's already as empty as it can get.
Chinese: 它已經空得不能再空了。

English: That draft won't work on the wood bin.
Chinese: 這織法對木箱不起作用。

English: Well, well, well.
If it isn't my faithful, TIRELESS\255\001apprentice, Rusty Nailbender.
Chinese: 這不是我那忠誠、不知疲倦的學徒\255\001\255\001羅斯·奈爾本德嗎。

English: Hello, er, Mr. Stoke.
And look! He's brought me a stick of wood.
Chinese: 看看啊！他給我帶回了一根木柴。

English: Exactly ONE crooked old stick of firewood\255\001for my poor, starving furnace.
Chinese: 而且就只有『一根』彎曲的破木柴\255\001要來餵給我那可憐、飢餓的火爐。

English: Firewood?
You lazy idiot!\255\001\255\001I sent you out FOUR\255\001HOURS ago to gather\255\001firewood, and you\255\001DARE to come back with\255\001ONE LOUSY STICK?
Chinese: 你這個懶惰的白痴！\255\001\255\001我在『四個小時前』\255\001派你去收集木柴，\255\001結果你居然敢只拿『一根破木棍』回來？

English: If your father wasn't\255\001the Foreman, I'd toss\255\001YOU in the furnace.\255\001\255\001Lucky for you he's\255\001downstairs with the\255\001Bishop right now.
Chinese: 要不是你父親是領班，\255\001我早就把你丟進火爐裡了。\255\001\255\001算你走運，他現在正和主教在樓下。

English: If that furnace goes\255\001out, the Clerics'\255\001swords will be LATE.\255\001\255\001Perhaps you'd care\255\001to ask the Bishop for\255\001forgiveness in person?\255\001\255\001Happy to arrange it!
Chinese: 如果那個火爐熄滅了，\255\001神職人員的劍就會遲交。\255\001\255\001也許你會有興趣\255\001親自去向主教\255\001請求寬恕？\255\001\255\001我很樂意幫你安排！

English: Give me that stick.
I know what to do with you.
I'll be back, Nailbender.
And I won't be alone.
straw
Guess my distaff still works.

English: Excellent, my son. Only one hole\255\001awaits your attention!

English: Well done, son! Half the holes are sealed.\255\001Soon you will be ready to continue.
Chinese: 做得好，孩子！一半的洞已經封上了。\255\001很快你就能準備好繼續前進了。

English: Do not fail to seal all of the holes\255\001behind you, my son.
Chinese: 務必把你身後的洞\255\001全都封上，孩子。

English: You dare not approach the Loom otherwise.
Chinese: 否則你絕對無法靠近織機。

English: Bobbin! There's still one hole\255\001you have yet to seal.
Chinese: 波賓！還有一個洞\255\001你還沒封上。

English: There are still a few holes you\255\001haven't sealed, Bobbin.
Chinese: 你還有幾個洞\255\001沒封上呢，波賓。

English: All of the holes should be sealed\255\001before you dare approach the Loom.
Chinese: 所有的洞都必須封上，\255\001你才有可能接近織機。

English: You must have many questions, Bobbin.
Chinese: 你一定有很多疑問，波賓。

English: Perhaps I can answer some of them.
Chinese: 也許我能回答其中一些。

English: You're the swan that came to visit me\255\001on my birthdays, aren't you?
Chinese: 你就是在我的生日時\255\001來看我的那天鵝，對吧？

English: You saw me clearly, then!\255\001I was never quite sure.\255\001\255\001The Elders forbade me to\255\001set foot on Loom island.\255\001But they said nothing\255\001about flying over it!
Chinese: 看來你當時看得很清楚！\255\001我一直不太確定。\255\001\255\001長老們禁止我\255\001踏上盧姆島。\255\001但他們可沒說\255\001不能飛過去！

English: Once a year, I managed\255\001to gain enough strength\255\001to pass Inside for a\255\001few brief moments.\255\001\255\001Those are the times\255\001that you saw me.
You are wondering why\255\001I should bother to\255\001visit at all ... and\255\001only on YOUR birthdays.\255\001\255\001Call it a mother's\255\001curiosity.
Chinese: 你一定在想為什麼\255\001我要費盡心思\255\001去探望你…而且\255\001偏偏只在『你』的生日。\255\001\255\001這就當作是身為母親的\255\001好奇心吧。

English: For that is who I am.
In life, I was Lady\255\001Cygna Threadbare.\255\001\255\001Banished by the Elders\255\001for drawing an unforeseen\255\001infant out of the Loom.\255\001\255\001Seventeen long years ago.
Chinese: 在世時，我曾是\255\001西格娜·疏織夫人。\255\001\255\001因為從織機中織出了一個\255\001未曾預見的嬰孩，\255\001而被長老們放逐。\255\001\255\001那是漫長的十七年前了。

English: I've missed you ... my son.
Chinese: 我一直很想你…我的孩子。

English: Liar!
My mother is buried in the cemetery.\255\001I visit her gravestone every day!
Chinese: 我母親就葬在墓園裡。\255\001我每天都會去她的墓前！

English: Hetchel's doing, no doubt.
Chinese: 那肯定是海切爾幹的好事。

English: She and the Elders put that there so\255\001you wouldn't ask too many questions.
Chinese: 她和長老們弄了那個墓碑，\255\001好讓你不會問東問西。

English: Hetchel vowed to protect you forever.\255\001She loves you very much, Bobbin.
Chinese: 海切爾發誓會永遠保護你。\255\001她非常愛你，波賓。

English: But I fear her love has driven her\255\001to recklessness.
Chinese: 但我擔心她的這份愛驅使著她\255\001做出了魯莽之舉。

English: What do you mean? Where is she?
Chinese: 妳是什麼意思？她在哪裡？

English: She has set off for\255\001the island, and\255\001the Loom Sanctuary.\255\001\255\001The Dead Ones are\255\001right behind her!

Their leader knows of\255\001the Loom's power.\255\001\255\001If he learns its\255\001secrets, the Pattern\255\001itself will be his\255\001to manipulate.\255\001\255\001Who knows what havoc\255\001he might wreak?
Hetchel hopes to\255\001reach the Loom\255\001before him.\255\001\255\001She intends to\255\001destroy it!
If Chaos doesn't\255\001consume her first.
Chinese: 如果混沌沒有\255\001先一步吞噬她的話。

English: No! I have to get back there!
You won't get far in that direction.\255\001The Loom lies beyond the lake.
Chinese: 那個方向你走不了多遠。\255\001織機在湖的另一端。

English: Besides, a more subtle strategy may\255\001improve your chances of success.
Chinese: 此外，採用更巧妙的策略或許能\255\001提高你成功的機率。

English: What strategy? What should I do?
The Dead Ones move between the holes your\255\001Bishop friend made in the Pattern.
Chinese: 死者們會透過你那位主教朋友\255\001在織圖上弄出的破洞間移動。

English: If you repair those holes, it will make\255\001it harder for them to follow you.
Chinese: 如果你能把那些洞補起來，\255\001他們就很難追蹤你了。

English: Goodmold
I can't go this way. The exit's blocked!
Chinese: 我不能走這條路。出口被擋住了！

English: Save your magic for the Dead Ones,\255\001Weaver boy.

English: Alive. At the moment, yes.

English: Ah. Weaver boy. Returned?

Chinese: 至少，你逃過了\255\001死者們的注意。

English: Crystalgard ... not so fortunate.
Chinese: 水晶加德…就沒那麼幸運了。

English: I don't understand.

Chinese: 你們不是守護著大鐮刀嗎！\255\001為什麼不用它？

English: We never doubted that the Scythe\255\001could save us.
Chinese: 我們從不懷疑那把鐮刀\255\001能拯救我們。

English: Even the Dead would have fallen\255\001in the wake of its wrath!
Chinese: 在它的怒火之下，\255\001連死者都會倒下！

English: But to unleash such merciless evil would\255\001make us as cowardly as they.
Chinese: 但釋放如此無情的邪惡力量，\255\001只會讓我們和他們一樣懦弱。

English: We wished not to become like our enemy.
Chinese: 我們不想變得和我們的敵人一樣。

English: And so we stayed our hand.\255\001We knew the price.
Chinese: 所以我們選擇了收手。我們知道代價是什麼。

English: Can I do anything?

Chinese: 記住我們，我年輕的朋友。

English: Tell the world we fought with courage,\255\001and chose death with clarity.
Chinese: 告訴世人我們曾勇敢奮戰，\255\001並且澄明地選擇了死亡。

English: Above all else ... clarity.
feather
Dead One

Leaving so soon, Weaver boy?

English: No use, Bobbin. That side of the Pattern\255\001is beyond the reach of our threads now.
Chinese: 沒用的，波賓。織圖的那一面\255\001現在已經超出我們音符的干涉範圍了。

English: Bobbin! Bobbin, you did it!

English: Ignorant fools! What have you done?

English: Your pious meddling\255\001has foiled my dream\255\001of an eternal empire,\255\001bound together under\255\001One Rule ...
Chinese: 你這自命清高的干涉\255\001毀了我建立一個\255\001受同一規則統治的\255\001永恆帝國的美夢…

English: ... MINE!
The Dead One is\255\001correct, my son.\255\001\255\001Your final draft\255\001tore the Pattern\255\001in half.

Chinese: 對於那些\255\001受困在另一邊的\255\001無辜者來說，\255\001這確實是個悲慘的命運。

Chinese: 然而，這\255\001也是我們\255\001這一邊的一個機會，\255\001得以重新開始編織\255\001沒有邪惡的\255\001第二張織圖！

English: Come.\255\001\255\001It is time for us\255\001to weave our\255\001destinies anew.

Chinese: 但我們不能就這樣拋下\255\001半個宇宙不管啊！

Chinese: 直到我們這邊的織圖被修補好之前，\255\001我們是無法回到另一邊的。

English: Take your rightful place\255\001among us now.
Chinese: 現在就來站到我們之中\255\001屬於你的位置吧。

English: Welcome to Crystalgard.

Chinese: 我是古德莫德大師，高貴的\255\001玻璃工匠公會的第三十一任大師。

Chinese: 我現在明白為什麼你們的\255\001布料會如此珍貴了。\255\001\255\001你身上的這件斗篷\255\001與我見過的任何東西\255\001都不一樣。\255\001\255\001真是非凡的做工。

English: Crystalgard's wisdom\255\001includes many legends\255\001concerning your Guild.\255\001\255\001One is particularly\255\001strange and amusing.\255\001\255\001They say it is death\255\001to peer beneath the\255\001hood of a Weaver.

English: Can this be true?

Chinese: 不知道。還沒有人在我身上試過。

English: Ha! An unclear reply if I ever heard one.
Chinese: 哈！這可真是我聽過最含糊的答案了。

English: We value clarity here above all else.
Chinese: 我們這裡最看重的就是澄明。

English: But fear not! Your legend is safe with us.

English: Imagine my relief.

English: However, our Guild\255\001catalog offers a fine\255\001selection of binoculars,\255\001telescopes and other\255\001precision optics that\255\001may help you in your\255\001search for swans.
